gates.description: First-pass compile rate >= 70% on 3 frameworks (Go testing, ginkgo, vitest). If not met, reconsider approach.
go build ./... succeeds; all existing tests pass; grep -r pkg/profile returns zero results
gen-test-scripts >= 85% first-pass compile rate; run-e2e-tests parses results correctly; init-justfile generates valid recipes
/forge:test-guide generates valid Convention file in < 5 min; Convention loaded correctly by gen-test-scripts
